'''chongangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:pickleable|pickleable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ng-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pickleable|pickleable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chongangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || chongangithi || chongangiji || chongangishi || chongangiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || chonganguthu || chonganguju || chongangushu || chonganguku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || chonganguthu || chonganguju || chongangushu || chonganguku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || chongangufthuf || chongangufjuf || chongangufshuf || chongangufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || chongangethe || chongangeje || chongangeshe || chongangeke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || chongangotho || chongangojo || chongangosho || chongangoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || chongangotho || chongangojo || chongangosho || chongangoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || chongangofthof || chongangofjof || chongangofshof || chongangofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || chongangïfthïf || chongangïfjïf || chongangïfshïf || chongangïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || chongangïfthïf || chongangïfjïf || chongangïfshïf || chongangïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || chongangïfthïf || chongangïfjïf || chongangïfshïf || chongangïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || chongangïfthïf || chongangïfjïf || chongangïfshïf || chongangïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || chongangæthæ || chongangæjæ || chongangæshæ || chongangækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || chongangatha || chongangaja || chongangasha || chongangaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || chongangatha || chongangaja || chongangasha || chongangaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || chongangafthaf || chongangafjaf || chongangafshaf || chongangafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || chongangasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || chongangshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || chongangroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || chongangmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || chongangyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gochongangnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gochongangnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gochongangnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gochongangnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || chongangangasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || chongangangshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || chongangangroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || chongangangmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || chongangangyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gochongangangnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gochongangangnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gochongangangnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gochongangangnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || chengængasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || chengængshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || chengængroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || chengængmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || chengængyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gochengængnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gochengængnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gochengængnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gochengængnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || chongfangasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || chongfangshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || chongfangroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || chongfangmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || chongfangyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gochongfangnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gochongfangnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gochongfangnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gochongfangnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
